texto: They lied, you know,” said Cpl. Allan Richmond. He hugged thewall next to Owens. Beside him, PFC Bucky Hatton crouched low, aBrowning 1911 semiautomatic gripped tightly in his hand.“Who?” asked Bart, glad to be out of the wind and rain, even if itwas only for a short time.“The assholes who said France was beautiful.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brian W. Matthews que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “They lied, you know,” said Cpl. Allan Richmond. He hugged thewall next to Owens. Beside him, PFC …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, travel, allan, com foco em viagem e dia-chuvoso.
